summary: Completed testing of JAIPUR furniture app bug fixes: 1) Quotation save with image field - WORKING, 2) Change password functionality - WORKING, 3) Edit item dialog image display - WORKING
passed_tests: Change Password API - POST /api/auth/change-password with JSON body
Change Password rejects wrong current password
Quotation create with items containing image field
Quotation GET retrieves items with images preserved
Change Password dialog opens with 3 fields (Current, New, Confirm)
Quotation page - save quotation with items
Edit Order page - items display with product images
Edit Item dialog - 'Main Product Image' label present
Edit Item dialog - fallback logic working (product_image || images[0])
critical_code_review_comments: QuotationItem model in server.py (line 298) now includes 'image' field - VERIFIED
Change password endpoint uses JSON body instead of query params - VERIFIED
openItemDialog in EditOrder.jsx (lines 214-219) has proper image fallback logic - VERIFIED
seed_data_creation: Created test quotations with TEST_ prefix, cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 reported bugs have been verified as fixed: 1) QuotationItem model includes 'image' field for saving product images within quotations 2) Change password endpoint accepts JSON body with current_password and new_password 3) Edit item dialog shows main image using fallback logic (product_image || images[0]). Backend tests created at /app/backend/tests/test_quotation_and_auth.py cover auth and quotation CRUD with image persistence.
